metadata.title: Rumour Harm: Digital Sociology, Reputational Contagion, and Networked Harm
metadata.description: A sociological white paper examining rumour propagation, reputational harm, and digital contagion in networked environments. Analyses amplification chains, institutional failure modes, and the network dynamics of reputational damage.

creators.name: Vallance, Richard Steven
creators.affiliation: Da Valenca — Leonardo Project, United Kingdom
